Wake up before the world does, just to meet yourself first
Move your body like it's a privilege, not a punishment
Sit in the sun without your phone
Say no without guilt, say yes without fear
Romanticize your tea/coffee like it's a ritual
Spend time with people who feel like an exhale
Do one thing daily with no outcome attached
Dress like you respect yourself
Forgive the version of you that didn't know better
Keep promises you make to yourself
Go on solo walks and listen to your thoughts
Create more than you consume
Laugh loudly, even if it feels too much
Eat slowly, like you deserve the moment
Try something new and be okay being bad at it
Celebrate small wins like they matter
Protect your energy from draining people
Read something that shifts your perspective
Write your thoughts instead of bottling them
Let go of timelines that aren't yours
Rest without earning it
Revisit what once made you feel alive
Speak kindly to yourself on hard days
Build a routine that supports you
Spend time in nature and feel small (in a good way)
Choose growth, even when it's uncomfortable
Nothing outside of you will fix your life
Track your progress daily - what gets measured gets improved
